name: VTIL_ExportObjectPool
title: VTIL_ExportObjectPool
syntax: long VTIL_ExportObjectPool(dbNode workingSetMaster, char objectPoolFilePath[]); // form 1
long VTIL_ExportObjectPool(dword addressWorkingSetMaster, char objectPoolFilePath[]); // form 2
long VTIL_ ExportObjectPool (dbNode vt, dbNode workingSetMaster, char objectPoolFilePath []); // form 3
long VTIL_ ExportObjectPool (dbNode vt, dword addressWorkingSetMaster, char objectPoolFilePath []); // form 4
description: Exports the current object pool of the Working Set Master into a file (*.iop). An existing file is overwritten.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: workingSetMaster
parameters.description: Working Set Master which object pool is exported (must not be the active Working Set).

parameters.name: addressWorkingSetMaster
parameters.description: Address of the Working Set Master which object pool is exported (must not be the active Working Set).

parameters.name: objectPoolPath
parameters.description: Path to the *.iop file the object pool has be exported to. Path has to be absolute or relative relating to the folder of the CANoe configuration.

parameters.name: versionLabel
parameters.description: The Virtual Terminal IL stores the object pool with this label

return: Working Set Master which object pool is
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
